title: Mansherry's Power Is Revealed
description: Pages 6–10 focus on mansherry's power is revealed, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the allies learn about Mansherry's healing power and start searching the palace while the battles continue under the Birdcage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Got it, Robin! Just a little more and we'll be at the flower fields!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The straw hat crew in the flesh are just unbelievable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Some- thing's floating up from below!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I never heard anything about a group trying to make it to the palace this way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Rebecca! Get the key to the flower fields!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Are you looking for something again? Viola?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Amidst the clouds and fighting, I thought I saw something that looked like a toy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: There she is! Sugar is awake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Oi! I told ya, didn't I!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: With my sure-kill face jack-in- the-box she got knocked out cold!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: She won't be back on her feet for at least another 2-3 days ...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: straw hat and the others don't know about her, do they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: She's revived! This is bad news for Luffy and the rest of them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: p- people with long noses better not stand next to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: People with long noses should just go and die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: What!? Miss Sugar, I thought you might be hungry, so I brought you some sausages...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Don't bring me those long things! You know I only eat grapes, right!? What are you retarded!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Just become a headcracker doll and go fight!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I must make this up to the young master! I'll turn every- one in this country

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Back into toys! And I'll start with that bloody, stupid, long-nose and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: The plateau containing the Royal Palace

summary: Mansherry's Power Is Revealed develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
